author: y4rr
content: Tight-budget stress test on Llama 3 8B + pw=3 BCE t=-2.5 predictor at 1 GiB VRAM budget (10% of MLP weight total): cos_sim=0.882 + argmax=311 ✓ (correctness-equivalent to 4 GiB run), 169 ms/decode token (~7× the 4 GiB run), 4656 host faults/forward, vram resident steady at 1 GiB. The paging stack is validated for 70B-scale memory-pressure scenarios. All 'do all three' research-axis attempts are now characterized: multi-tap (negative), more data (OOM-bounded), local plainact (positive infrastructure, marginal pareto). Final pareto unchanged: pw=3 BCE t=-2.5 → 57% MLP weight bandwidth saved with argmax preserved on Llama 3 8B. 85 lib tests pass.
